title: Hard Water Filter Shower Head with 4 Modes, Water Temperature Display, 15 Layers Filtration High Pressure Filtered Shower Heads with Holder and 1.5M Hose, for Residual Chlorine Remove, Silver
features: 【Upgraded 15 Stage Filter】This filtered shower head is equipped with a 15 stage filtration system, which is composed of more than 12 kinds of filter media such as KDF, calcium sulfite, activated carbon, vitamin C, and ceramic balls, and is wrapped with PP cotton. It can remove and filter residual chlorine, bacteria, heavy metals and sediments and other harmful substances from tap water more effectively, enjoy your shower and improve your health at the same time.

【Intelligent Temperature Display】With the innovative real-time digital display technology, it can instantly display the real-time water temperature by tapping the screen. Ensure your child's safe bathing and prevent accidental scalding.

【3+1 Modes Shower Filter】This shower head has 4 water spray modes, including Rain, Wave, Pulse, plus a super powerful spray gun mode. The three shower modes have different water output and water pressure to meet your different shower needs. The spray gun mode can easily and instantly rinse away foam, hair and dirt in the bathroom, creating a better shower environment. Simply press the right side of the shower head to easily switch modes.

【High Pressure & Water-saving】 This shower head filter has a unique structure that delivers high water pressure and a stable flow, ensuring a continuous and strong water jet even at low water pressures. It not only provides a perfect showering experience, but also helps improve water efficiency, saving at least 30% of water. The shower head is also equipped with a switch. Just press the on/off button to turn the water on or off, or adjust the water pressure.

【What You Get】The package includes 1 handheld shower head, 1 1.5m stainless steel hose, a shower holder, 3 filter cartridges, 1 instruction manual. The 1.5m hose can be easily connected to the existing shower outlet via the universal G1/2'' thread, without any tools or plumber. We provide you with a one-year warranty. If you have any questions about our products, please feel free to contact us.
